ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user (e.g., creator, backer, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., creator, backer, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crowdfunding_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "backers_count" INTEGER /* Number of backers for the project */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the project (e.g., fashion, technology) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Subcategory of the project */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was created */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the project to reach its funding goal */,
  "launched_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was launched */,
  "pledged" REAL /* Amount pledged to the project */,
  "usd_pledged" REAL /* Amount pledged in USD */,
  "goal" REAL /* Funding goal of the project */,
  "usd_goal" REAL /* Funding goal converted to USD */,
  "staff_pick" INTEGER /* Indicates if the project is a staff pick */,
  "state" TEXT /* Current state of the project (e.g., live, successful) */,
  "blurb" TEXT /* Short blurb or description of the project */,
  "blurb_length" INTEGER /* Length of the project blurb or description */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "project_images" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of project images */,
  "project_videos" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of project video links */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the reward */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the reward tier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reward tier */,
  "pledge_amount" REAL /* Pledge amount required to receive the reward */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the reward available */,
  "shipped_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the reward was shipped */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date for the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pledges" (
  "pledge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pledge */,
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the backer who made the pledge */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the pledge */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward tier associated with the pledge */,
  "pledge_amount" REAL /* Amount pledged */,
  "pledged_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the pledge was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the pledge (e.g., pending, fulfilled, refunded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pledge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_status_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the status change */,
  "status" TEXT /* New status of the project (e.g., live, successful) */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the status change occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_picks_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff pick change */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the staff pick change */,
  "staff_pick" INTEGER /* Indicates if the project is a staff pick */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the staff pick change occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)
